videos.headline: Cade Klubnik eludes pressure and throws a dot for a TD
videos.description: Cade Klubnik avoids the blitz and finds Troy Stellato for a Clemson touchdown.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Cade Klubnik eludes pressure and throws a dot for a TD) 2023/09/30 ESHEET

videos.headline: Xavier Thomas sets up a Will Shipley touchdown

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Xavier Thomas sets up a Will Shipley touchdown) 2023/09/30 ESHEET

videos.headline: Dan Villari weaves his way into the end zone for a Syracuse TD
videos.description: Dan Villari makes the catch and slips multiple defenders for Syracuse's first TD of the day.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Dan Villari weaves his way into the end zone for a Syracuse TD) 2023/09/30 ESHEET

videos.headline: Garrett Shrader finds LeQuint Allen Jr. for a Syracuse TD
videos.description: Garrett Shrader hits LeQuint Allen Jr. with a perfectly placed pass for a Syracuse touchdown.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_OnePlay (Garrett Shrader finds LeQuint Allen Jr. for a Syracuse TD) 2023/9/23

videos.headline: Phil Mafah cuts through Syracuse's defense for a 32-yard TD run
videos.description: Phil Mafah finds the gap for a 32-yard touchdown run for Clemson.
